title: hypodematium eglandulosum
intro: Hypodematium eglandulosum, also known as the Forked Polyodium, is a type of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Hypodematium eglandulosum are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
